title: Start/Stop Workload
content:
# Start/Stop Workload

You can start / stop a Workload.

    This will not undeploy the workload from the edge system, so you can restart it at anytime without having to deploy the Workload again.

Go to **Applications** in the Kelvin UI and select the Application where your workloads are deployed and click on the **Workloads** tab.

OR click on the name of a **Workload** to see its details and then click on the **Update Workload** button.

Then click on the Start / Stop button to change it running status.

    If the button is grayed out, then this usually means the workload status is `unavailable`.
    
    This problem will need to be resolved first before you can control the workload.
summary: You can start / stop a Workload.
